reviews.review_description: Really good game. I haven’t met any toxic players and people were cheering me which made my day. And I like trying the 2020 version of rec room and I joined the real rec room in 2023 or 2024. But 2020 rec room is pretty cool and nice I really recommend this game.

reviews.review_title: This game has so much potential.
reviews.review_description:
*PLEASE READ!* I have seen many many reviews regarding this issue. You cannot, whatsoever, get past the username window. Every single time you enter any username at all, there is an error! And just this morning, it started to show code summer. I truly understand these issues probably come from so many people trying to play, but they are still issues. Thank you for this amazing game, and I am looking forward to playing it. Thank you for your time. (In no way is this review meant to come off as rude, this is just to state my personal experience!)

Edit: The issue is now fixed! But now, I cannot get through orientation without it just bringing me to my dorm. And once I’m there, it glitches and brings me back to orientation over and over.

Edit 2: I am glad to announce all of the glitches and issues are gone! I have updated it to five stars. Thank you so much. I LOVE THIS GAME!
 
- SincereRR
